name: zip-issue-expander
description: Paperclip plugin that expands archive attachments into a stable company binary path and comments local file paths back onto issues.

interface.shortDescription: Expands archive attachments and comments local file paths.
interface.longDescription: When an issue, comment, or attachment event carries a supported archive file, this plugin expands it under a company-scoped binary directory, writes a manifest, and comments the resulting host paths back onto the issue for later agent use.
defaultPrompt: Expand archive attachments into a company binary path and comment the direct local file paths.
